parameters.query: SELECT stage, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value::numeric),0)/1000000,1) as value_m FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Go','No-Bid','Cancelled','Lost','Won') GROUP BY stage ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT
  COALESCE(plan_data->>'stage','Go/No-Go') as stage,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE WHEN plan_data->>'allocated_revenue_value' ~ '^[0-9.]+$'
    THEN (plan_data->>'allocated_revenue_value')::numeric ELSE 0 END
  ),0)/1000000,2) as alloc_m,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE WHEN plan_data->>'total_contract_value' ~ '^[0-9.]+$'
    THEN (plan_data->>'total_contract_value')::numeric ELSE 0 END
  ),0)/1000000,2) as tcv_m
FROM gda_capture_plans
WHERE COALESCE(plan_data->>'stage','Go/No-Go') NOT IN ('Pass','No-Bid','No-Go','Lost','Won','Cancelled')
GROUP BY COALESCE(plan_data->>'stage','Go/No-Go')
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT
  cp.opp_title,
  cp.agency,
  cp.contract_value,
  COALESCE(cp.plan_data->>'stage','Go/No-Go') as stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'pwin' as pwin,
  cp.plan_data->>'total_contract_value' as tcv
FROM gda_capture_plans cp
WHERE COALESCE(cp.plan_data->>'stage','Go/No-Go') NOT IN ('Pass','No-Bid','No-Go','Lost','Won','Cancelled')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN cp.plan_data->>'total_contract_value' ~ '^[0-9.]+$'
  THEN (cp.plan_data->>'total_contract_value')::numeric ELSE 0 END DESC
LIMIT 10;
